name: haejwo
description: 해줘 — "just handle it." A lubricant harness on top of Claude Code: you talk, and the models work it out among themselves — the host plans with an independent reviewer, delegates to cost tiers (opus=reasoning, sonnet=implementation, haiku=chores, codex=outside review), and verifies; a PreToolUse gate physically keeps the expensive main model from doing cheap work. Zero workflow commands. Commands exist only for settings (setup/status/gate/push).

interface.shortDescription: 해줘 — just handle it; the models work it out among themselves
